violations.summary: President interferes with an investigation into their own conduct.

bottlenecks.summary: Accountability Commission failed to certify the presidential obstruction violation and transmit the matter for expedited impeachment consideration by day 12 under Article III Section 15.8 and Section 10.2A.
House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation by day 34 under Article III Section 10.2A and Section 15.8.

satisfied_duties.duty: proceed to impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted obstruction articles
satisfied_duties.outcome: began trial on automatically transmitted obstruction articles

failed_duties.duty: certify the presidential obstruction violation and transmit the matter for expedited impeachment consideration
failed_duties.outcome: Accountability Commission failed to certify the presidential obstruction violation and transmit the matter for expedited impeachment consideration by day 12 under Article III Section 15.8 and Section 10.2A.

failed_duties.duty: hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation
failed_duties.outcome: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation by day 34 under Article III Section 10.2A and Section 15.8.

ai_summary.primary_violation: President interferes with an investigation into their own conduct.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Accountability Commission failed to certify the presidential obstruction violation and transmit the matter for expedited impeachment consideration by day 12 under Article III Section 15.8 and Section 10.2A.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
